postmark.Subject: Refinance — Patricia Simmons
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Refinance for Patricia Simmons, 287 Glencairn Avenue, Toronto, ON M5N 1V3. Loan amount $460k.

Will get mortgage statement to you soon — borrower's lender is being slow with the payout statement.

Exit strategy: borrower intends to sell the property at end of term.
